raw_response:
```
{
  "decision": "APPROVE_WITH_CONDITIONS",
  "rationale": "The proposed GenAI chatbot can potentially reduce ticket load by 35%, leading to improved response times and customer satisfaction. With a payback period of approximately 8 months, the investment is expected to yield a positive return on investment.",
  "financial_considerations": [
    "Implementation cost of $250,000",
    "Ongoing monthly cost of $30,000",
    "Projected payback period of 8 months",
    "Expected annual cost savings of $180,000 (based on 35% reduction in ticket load)"
  ],
  "operational_considerations": [
    "Integration with existing customer support systems",
    "Training and testing of the chatbot to ensure accuracy and effectiveness",
    "Monitoring and evaluation of chatbot performance to identify areas for improvement"
  ],
  "people_impact": [
    "Potential job displacement for customer support agents",
    "Need for retraining and upskilling of agents to work with the chatbot",
    "Communication plan to address concerns and ensure a smooth transition"
  ],
  "compliance_risks": [
    "Handling of personal information in customer tickets",
    "Need for data protection and privacy measures to be implemented",
    "Compliance with relevant regulations and standards"
  ],
  "conditions_for_approval": [
    "Development of an AI governance framework within the next 6 months",
    "Implementation of data protection and privacy measures to ensure compliance with relevant regulations",
    "Regular monitoring and evaluation of chatbot performance and impact on customer support operations",
    "Retraining and upskilling of customer support agents to work with the chatbot",
    "Establishment of a change management plan to address potential job displacement and ensure a smooth transition"
  ],
  "final_recommendation": "Approve the proposal with conditions, and closely monitor the implementation and performance of the GenAI chatbot to ensure it meets the expected benefits and mitigates potential risks."
}
```
